Text.Name: TheGate
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The majestic and ornate sect stone stele image, an honor exclusive to the elite strategy group.

Text.Name: LsDog
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The daemonized Huajuan image in the Yaoguais' Era

Text.Name: Building_JiaShan2
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The majestic and ornate rockery image, an honor exclusive to the elite strategy group.

Text.Name: Building_Tower
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The image of the dragon bell suppressing evil spirits signifies peace and prosperity.

Text.Name: Building_BigTripod
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The natural image of the Spirit Gourd symbolizes the pre-order milestone

Text.Name: Building_ColdHole
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The image of an ancient and simple alchemy furnace with restrained divine light, a symbol of milestone reservation.

Text.Name: Building_StoneMan
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The image of a majestic armored general statue, a symbol of milestone reservation.

Text.Name: Building_BigSwordPillar
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The image of an ancient giant sword with multiple seals.

Text.Name: IncenseTripod
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The image of the Purple Gold Furnace, renowned as a treasure of the Daoist sect.

Text.Name: Building_BingFengDiaoSu
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The magnificent and noble Phoenix King sculpture image.

Text.Name: Building_QingTongLong
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: Tall and noble Kirin image.

Text.Name: Item_HorseFromJY_Boar
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The special Spirit Contract image in the Yaoguais' Era

Text.Name: Building_XiaoDanLu1
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The image of an ancient and simple alchemy furnace with restrained divine light, a symbol of milestone reservation.

Text.Name: Build_TheBigGate
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The antique-style mountain gate decoration represents the sincerest apology.

Text.Name: WuDangXuanWuDeng
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The symbol of vows, the Six-Tusked White Elephant demonstrates its power.

Text.Name: Item_Other_PuppetTest
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Substitute image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!

Text.Name: Bed
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Single Bed image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!

Text.Name: WaterTank
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Water Vat image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!

Text.Name: Candlestick
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Oil Lamp image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!

Text.Name: Building_MagicCushion
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Qi Cushion image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!

Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Alchemy Furnace image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!

Text.Name: Cushion

Text.Name: Building_BigCenser
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Censer image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!

Text.Name: StreetLight
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Lamp Post image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!

Text.Name: SmallTable
Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Table image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!

Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Small Square Table image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!

Text.CosmeticsDatas.1.Desc: The Display image from Yaoguais' Era, thank you to every player who supports 'Amazing Cultivation Simulator'!
